name: Alpha Rehabilitation Trnsprtn
registry_source: Michigan LARA / MiBusiness Registry Portal (mibusinessregistry.lara.state.mi.us) - direct lookup blocked (HTTP 403); third-party listings confirm operating business
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate); SAFER keyword search for ALPHA REHABILITATION returned zero records. Third-party directories (Yelp, Cortera) list operating address at 21170 W 8 Mile Rd, Southfield, MI 48075 rather than the Franklin, MI address in source data - likely same operator with Franklin being a registered/residential address and Southfield the office. Non-emergency / rehab transport profile (not pure school bus).

name: Saferide Services

name: Mark's Transportation
fmcsa_status: Active; Not Authorized for interstate for-hire (private/intrastate operation)
registry_source: Massachusetts Secretary of the Commonwealth Corporations Division (corp.sec.state.ma.us) - direct lookup not retrieved; Manta indicates MA LLC established 2010
notes: Confirmed FMCSA match - MARK'S TRANSPORTATION LLC, USDOT 1970276 at same Milford, MA address. MCS-150 updated 07/17/2024. Zero inspections / zero crashes past 24 months. Transports students/adults using 7D Certificate (no CDL required). Small operator (3 buses, 1 driver).

name: Onebunchhookup LLC
entity_status: active (26 years in business; A+ BBB)
registry_source: BBB profile + LinkedIn (Sherman Bunch Sr.) + company website onebunchhookup.com; Louisiana SOS coraweb.sos.la.gov not directly retrieved
notes: no USDOT (likely intrastate NEMT); SAFER keyword search for ONE BUNCH / ONEBUNCHHOOKUP returned zero records. Non-emergency medical transport for elderly Medicare/Medicaid clients in greater New Orleans - NOT a school bus operator. Likely off-thesis for Summit student-transport tuck-in.
